title: 13th Angel
wikitext:
[]: 13th Angel [Spoilers Now, Apparently]             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Aug 22, 2009 1:10 am Considering Wevangeliwon 's environmentalist themes , I'm betting the final Angel will turn out to be Global Warming. What do you guys think?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sat Aug 22, 2009 1:18 am Maybe.But it depends on how many angels will be in the next movie and which ones will be in or if they're gonna be all new angels like 2.0.I mean,Kawrou could still be the final angel so.I dont know.Just throwing what I think out there.*shrugs*.

[]:             Quote Post by armoredcorecc » Sat Aug 22, 2009 7:54 am Eva 04 wrote: Maybe.But it depends on how many angels will be in the next movie and which ones will be in or if they're gonna be all new angels like 2.0.I mean,Kawrou could still be the final angel so.I dont know.Just throwing what I think out there.*shrugs*.

[]: Re: 13th Angel             Quote Post by schismatics » Sat Aug 22, 2009 8:24 am NAveryW wrote: Considering Wevangeliwon 's environmentalist themes , I'm betting the final Angel will turn out to be Global Warming. What do you guys think?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva4Dummies » Sat Aug 22, 2009 9:04 am Well I think since Kaworu is the last angel, and they have three to go Kaworu is going to have to fight in the Mark 06, cause they cant just kill him at the beginning of the movie, right??

[]:             Quote Post by Soul Fire » Sat Aug 22, 2009 9:40 am So what is the point of this thread again? Are spoilers allowed? Ect [quote]

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Aug 22, 2009 9:56 am Soul Fire wrote: So what is the point of this thread again? Are spoilers allowed? Ect

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Sat Aug 22, 2009 11:43 am It's still Tabris. And speaking of angels, do you think it's odd? The third angel appeared over the Bethany base and that base was only mentioned in 2.0, while the first angel seen in 1.0 is classified as the fourth angel. IMO, the first few events before the eye-catcher in 2.0 would suggest it happened before Shinji moved into Tokyo 3. Any idea people?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Aug 22, 2009 12:10 pm We are the last angel.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Aug 22, 2009 12:50 pm Correction, Lili is the last Angel. She can cause Any impact whenever she feels like. As to the final angels, well it seems that in NGE the angel difficulty seemed to vary but in Rebuild the system is almost like a game sequence, You start off terrible, the enemies are terrible, eventually you get better, the enemies get tougher. Then Angels sure have been getting a lot tougher one by one. . . . Except Clockiel. . . IT'S A CLOCK FOR GENDOS SAKE, HOW HARD CAN THAT BE? Anyway, I think that despite the shortened time they're going to have, 3.0 and 4.0 should have some pretty intense action and some good story line.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Aug 22, 2009 3:36 pm wonderluster wrote: Correction, Lili is the last Angel. She can cause Any impact whenever she feels like.

[]: Re: 13th Angel [Spoilers Now, Apparently]             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Aug 22, 2009 4:04 pm NAveryW wrote: Considering Wevangeliwon 's environmentalist themes , I'm betting the final Angel will turn out to be Global Warming. What do you guys think?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Aug 22, 2009 5:38 pm How can Adam give birth to Global Warming? It's not a being.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Aug 22, 2009 6:21 pm Or is it?

[]: Re: 13th Angel [Spoilers Now, Apparently]             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Sat Aug 22, 2009 6:28 pm NAveryW wrote: Considering Wevangeliwon 's environmentalist themes , I'm betting the final Angel will turn out to be Global Warming. What do you guys think?

[]: Re: 13th Angel [Spoilers Now, Apparently]             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Aug 22, 2009 6:32 pm Maybe it will be something like an embodiement of Global Warming - like the couterpoint to the Forest God in Miyazaki's Mononoke Hime?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Aug 22, 2009 7:30 pm If anything, the 13th Angel would be mankind for STARTING Global Warming. Making Global Warming an independent being would mean it's not our fault.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sun Aug 23, 2009 4:19 am AuraTwilight wrote: If anything, the 13th Angel would be mankind for STARTING Global Warming. Making Global Warming an independent being would mean it's not our fault.

[]:             Quote Post by User-iel » Sun Aug 23, 2009 5:55 am @NAveryW, AuraTwilight and LiLi - Hey, I'm not gonna strain myself for this one. Enough big showroom models with high maintenance. Every gamer (and even if you aren't) knows it's time for the Adamites to rush the base. And there's no school like the old school. [stampede] Lillim shall pay for their wastefulness! Face the wrath of the Ohmu! Works the first time, everytime. Oh, numbering system may be revised up if we have been trolled. Is there an Inanna SoL this time around? This name is associated with lillith. [/stampede]

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 23, 2009 6:00 am mmmeh. I say it's going to be Kaworu for the 12th or 13th. If he's the 12th, then some new Angel will be #13, or it'll be Lilin again. But ARE there going to be 13 Angels? I thought there was only 12...guess I'm remembering Gendo's line in 1.11 wrong.
